name: software-agent-sdk
strengths: Monorepo with 4 distributable packages (sdk, tools, workspace, agent-server)
Async/sync parity — every async method has sync counterpart
Tool Registry pattern with is_usable() filtering
Progressive disclosure for agent skills (1-1024 char descriptions)
Comprehensive CI: pre-commit hooks, typecheck (pyright), lint (ruff), tests
MCP config uses FastMCP typed MCPConfig
Separate AGENTS.md per package for AI-agent development
Behavior tests (realistic scenarios) + integration tests + stress tests + unit tests
